creator: linus.sundqvist@loopia.se
text:
Created attachment 221462
distinfo

This package seems to be needed for rubygem-facter (included by default in puppet7) to resolve "mountpoints" fact. The current version (1.1.9) is 3 years old and crashes when trying to resolve the fact.

Updating to latest version seems to fix that issue.

I don't know how you want patch-files to be created or if you can help me with that part, but I've included the distinfo at least.
